posts.text: Garware Technical Fibres to buy back shares at ₹680

posts.author: Kush_Smart
posts.text: Garware Technical Fibres looks like a very high-quality niche manufacturing business rather than a normal commodity textile company. The biggest positive is that the company operates in specialized technical applications like fisheries, aquaculture, agriculture, sports, defense-related applications, industrial ropes and geosynthetics where product performance matters more than just price. That creates stronger customer stickiness, better margins, and lower competition compared to ordinary textile businesses. The annual report also shows that management keeps investing steadily into plant & mac…
